title: Plushia Pack [Wildcard]
description: Official Modpack for the Plushia Wildcard Server
body:
### This modpack is the official modpack for the Plushia Wildcard Server

#### At Plushia, we strive to create an inclusive and welcoming safe space for LGBTQIA+ people, and give them a place where they can play games without the fear of discrimination.

---

This Modpack is for our Wildcard Server, Wildcard is a server that runs on short term seasons and changes theme based on a community vote for each season.

---

#### The current theme is **Origins** so you will be able to:
- Choose from many Origins from beloved addons
- Learn to play the game differently with your chosen Origin
- Build up a community with the other people on the server
- And more you can discover for yourself on our new server!

---


### Join Plushia today by joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/U9ueyjQ3HS)!
